about.name: Naina Verma
about.bio: Hello! I am a passionate developer who treats code like a digital garden—carefully planting seeds of logic, nurturing them with beautiful design, and watching them bloom into seamless user experiences. With a deep love for front-end architecture and interactive interfaces, I specialize in crafting applications that are not only highly functional but aesthetically enchanting.

projects.name: Floral Boutique E-commerce
projects.description: A fully functional e-commerce platform built for a boutique florist, featuring real-time inventory and a beautiful user interface.

projects.name: Garden Planner App
projects.description: An interactive web application that allows users to design and layout their own virtual gardens with drag-and-drop mechanics.

education.summary: Graduated with honors. Focused on full-stack web development and user interface design.
Intensive coursework on modern design principles, wireframing, and interactive prototyping.

settings.seoDescription: A beautiful, premium developer portfolio blooming with creativity.
